title: Vanilla Focussed
description: A modpack that focusses on keeping the game vanilla while increasing performance and improving small parts of the game with QOL mods.
body:
**Info**

Vanilla focussed is a modpack aimed at keeping your game as vanilla as possible while increasing not just performance but your quality of life with an amazing selection of mods.

**About**

So why did I make this when there's tons of modpacks out there already doing the same thing? Well I believe that I know what people like me want. We love vanilla Minecraft but hate some of the things about the game. I set out to look for the best mods that didn't take away from vanilla game we all love.

**Performace**

**Specs:** GPU: 3080ti CPU: i12700k

Tests taken at 32 render distance with all settings on max quality with resolution at 1440p.

**This is how the test was taken.**

![Here's how the test was taken.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4717416f8bd84cea229d4968d901e180a549de05.png)

**Base game. No mods (Only MiniHUD and Mod Menu)**

![Base game. No mods (Only MiniHud and Mod Menu)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7afe869ac5f2d797d65316d3e959ba6a272a6405.png)

**Vanilla Focussed (No Nvidium)**

![Vanilla Focussed (No Nvidium)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb8ac523fcd00b52ba7e040296443d88fc38bdb4.png)

**Vanilla Focussed (With Nvidium)**

![Vanilla Focussed (With Nvidium)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec20606dfdec487eabe666c70067426b84681293.png)

So how come there's 2 seperate tests on the modpack? Well [Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) is an amazing mod that "uses mesh shaders, a near fully gpu driven rendering pipeline is used, enabling very fast and performant geometry culling of terrain meaning your gpu can work much more efficiently." However this mod is **optional** as only certain systems can utilize it. This was taken off their page which you can visit using the link.

**QOL**

The main focus of this pack was not to make the game "easier" with QOL mods but rather just improve your time in the game with select mods that make the experience better. Here's some I think you'll like (List does not include all mods, just more notable ones).

### Better Ping Display - Shows ping in numbers instead of bars

![Better Ping Display](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e496130c315b717d407083afea8fc61ee686982.png)

### Better F3 - Improves the F3 screen by colourcoding and allowing you to select what you want on the screen

![BetterF3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3d1347413e554e13ccf9221de16744d9f35b73b5.png)

### Boat Item View - Doesn't hide maps while rowing a boat

![Boat Item View](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9371ad30b78a7287d660f7cbfbb766b0d3a6ac3a.png)

### Borderless Mining - Fullscreen becomes borderless windowed. Handy for those with multiple monitors.

### Chat Coords - Allows you to set a hotkey to past current coordinates in chat

![Chat Coords](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b82bc255d4faed4b72a25f8f59b5e2913007cd9a.png)

### Chat Heads - Adds player heads next to chat messages so you can see who you're chatting to

![Chat Heads](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/352d2fc6c00d0670e3845a9713a92dec9cae13c5.png)

### Cherished Worlds - Favourite your worlds

![Cherished Worlds](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb1757ed3315eff6c6ba5036ea5be1f723e63e69.png)

### Chunky - Pre load chunks to reduce lag when playing a world

![Chunky](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88ccf2adce0bf5e42ea821086deabe33ef119063.png)

### Death Log - See how you died and what you had on you

![Death Log](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3bd68da3d4e992b427bdeeefe49b5c00ffa22844.png)

### Held Item Info - Adds the bedrock feature that shows item enchants when holding your tool 

![Held Item Info](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/afe56c64cbd3ad79bc2d87cf69e7a2b6248282be.png)

### MiniHUD - Adds a customizable HUD to your screen since using F3 can be laggy

![MiniHUD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec20606dfdec487eabe666c70067426b84681293.png)

### Mouse Tweaks - Improves inventory management by adding functions to your mouse butttons

### Resourcify - Adds an ingame resource pack and shader store

![Resourcify](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/08aac814b146a489eaa663e0d78107434a6cf1c9.png)

### Screenshot To Clipboard - Allows screenshots to be copied to your clipboard

### Seamless Loading Screen - Screenshots on exit allowing for seamless loading the next time you join your world

![Seamless Loading Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6355e6f6f497d7d78ddf95e6768355f7e22c6366.png)

### Show Me Your Skin - Allows you to hide armour on either yourself or other players

![Show Me Your Skin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abea39a876d3562a6ccc8e8e296a1e4d61e6e403.png)

### Shulker Box Tooltips - See whats in your shulkerboxes in your inventory

![Shulker Box Tooltips](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/152a05511424ed07865fc9d743a7b9fcd93b32db.png)

### ToolStats - Get more information on your tools

![ToolStats](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c946a1a5bfcf36eb457483bde0b3dbdf4cc99f8e.png)

### Zoomify - Allows you to add a hotkey to zoom

![Zoomify](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b2c0d6706709280f254335870f9a1ed2e9782df5.png)

## Mods

<details>
<summary>Mod list</summary>

[Advancementinfo](https://modrinth.com/mod/advancementinfo) - Show more information about advancement requirements

[Amecs](https://modrinth.com/mod/amecs) - Improves your keys & controls setup by providing modifier keys and making multi-functional keys a thing

[Animatica](https://modrinth.com/mod/animatica) - A mod implementing the OptiFine/MCPatcher animated texture format

[AntiGhost](https://modrinth.com/mod/antighost) - Get rid of ghost blocks by requesting resends from the server

[BadOptimizations](https://modrinth.com/mod/badoptimizations) - Optimization mod that focuses on things other than rendering

[BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) - BetterF3 is a mod that replaces Minecraft's original debug HUD with a highly customizable, more human-readable HUD

[Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud) - Improves the ingame HUD while riding a mount

[Better Ping Display [Fabric]](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) - Adds a configurable numerical ping display to the player list

[Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats) - A Minecraft mod that improves the statistics screen and makes it more useful

[Boat Item View](https://modrinth.com/mod/boat-item-view) - See your held items when in a moving boat!

[Bobby](https://modrinth.com/mod/bobby) - Allows for render distances greater than the server's view-distance

[Bookshelf](https://modrinth.com/mod/bookshelf-lib) - An open source library for other mods!

[Borderless Mining](https://modrinth.com/mod/borderless-mining) - Changes Fullscreen to use a borderless window

[Concurrent Chunk Management Engine (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) - A Fabric mod designed to improve the chunk performance of Minecraft 

[Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes) - Lets you use capes from OptiFine, LabyMod and other cape mods

[Centered Crosshair](https://modrinth.com/mod/centered-crosshair) - Centers the crosshair to be perfectly in the middle of the screen

[Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads) - See who you're chatting with!

[Chat Coords](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-coords) - Send your coordinates in the chat with the press of a button

[Chat Patches](https://modrinth.com/mod/chatpatches) - A Minecraft Fabric client-side mod that touches up a few aspects of Minecraft's mundane chat, with as much configurability as possible!

[Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds) - Favorite/pin/bookmark certain worlds, which will always be at the top of the list and cannot be deleted

[Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) - Pre-generates chunks, quickly and efficiently

[Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Configuration Library for Minecraft Mods

[Clumps](https://modrinth.com/mod/clumps) - Clumps XP orbs together to reduce lag

[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - A Fabric mod that allows for efficient connected textures

[Controlling](https://modrinth.com/mod/controlling) - Adds a search bar to the Key-Bindings menu

[CraftPresence](https://modrinth.com/mod/craftpresence) - Completely Customize the way others see you play in Discord!

[CraterLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/craterlib) - Library mod for HypherionSA and First Dark Development mods

[Dark Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/dark-loading-screen) - Makes the loading screen darker

[DeathLog](https://modrinth.com/mod/deathlog) - Keeps track of the many embarrassing times you died 

[Debugify](https://modrinth.com/mod/debugify) - Fixes Minecraft bugs found on the bug tracker

[Disable Custom Worlds Advice](https://modrinth.com/mod/dcwa) - Minecraft asking you if you want to load a custom world is annoying. Let's fix it!

[Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Improve performance when Minecraft is in the background

[Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - Reduce FPS lag with block entities, as well as customize them with resource packs

[[EMF] Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) - EMF is an, OptiFine format, Custom Entity Model replacement mod available for Fabric and Forge

[[ETF] Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - Emissive, Random & Custom texture support for entities in resourcepacks just like Optifine but for Fabric

[Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible

[ESSENTIAL Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) - Boost your Minecraft. Play together without a server. Customize your character. And more

[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Lightweight and modular API providing common hooks and intercompatibility measures utilized by mods using the Fabric toolchain

[Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) - This is a mod that enables usage of the Kotlin programming language for Fabric mods

[FabricSkyboxes](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricskyboxes) - Allows resource packs to define custom skyboxes

[Fabrishot](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabrishot) - Take insanely large screenshots because why not

[Fadeless](https://modrinth.com/mod/fadeless) - Remove fade out animations in Minecraft (1.20+)

[fast-ip-ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping) - Yeet the laggy reversed DNS lookup for pure IP server addresses

[FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimizations

[Held Item Info](https://modrinth.com/mod/held-item-info) - Shows information (like enchantments) about the held item under its name

[Highlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/highlight) - Highlight changes the visualization of specific blocks in the game to have more aligned selections to their models

[ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft

[Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) - Sodium addon providing support for the Fabric Rendering API, based on Indigo

[Infinite Music](https://modrinth.com/mod/infinite-music) - Removes the delay between music tracks, updated to 1.20.4

[Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - A modern shaders mod for Minecraft intended to be compatible with existing OptiFine shader packs

[Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) - A mod to optimize the Minecraft networking stack

[Language Reload](https://modrinth.com/mod/language-reload) - Reduces load times and adds fallbacks for languages

[Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod

[MaLiLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/malilib) - A library mod for client-side mods. Contains most of the common/shared code of masa's client mods, and adds some inter-operation support between the dependent mods 

[Memory Leak Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/memoryleakfix) - A mod that fixes random memory leaks for both the client and server

[MidnightControls](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightcontrols) - Adds controller support and enhanced controls overall

[MidnightLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/midnightlib) - Common library with a built-in configuration system

[MiniHUD](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minihud) - A client-side mod that allows displaying various "info lines" on the screen ("mini-F3"). The alignment (screen corner), background and text color and font size are configurable. Note: This is a client-side-only mod! You can't put it on a server

[Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix) - Fixes gaps in Block Models and Item Models

[ModernFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix) - All-in-one mod that improves performance, reduces memory usage, and fixes many bugs. Compatible with all your favorite performance mods!

[Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed

[More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - A mod that changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance

[Mouse Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-tweaks) - Enhances inventory management by adding various functions to the mouse buttons

[No Resource Pack Warnings](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-resource-pack-warnings) - Disable warnings for outdated resource/data packs

[Noxesium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noxesium)[No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports) - Makes chat unreportable (where possible)

[Nvidium](https://modrinth.com/mod/nvidium) - Fast nvidia only rendering engine for sodium (Optional mod)

[OptiGUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/optigui) - Custom inventory GUIs on Fabric&Quilt with OptiFine resource pack support&many more features

[oωo (owo-lib)](https://modrinth.com/mod/owo-lib) - A general utility, GUI and config library for modding on Fabric and Quilt

[Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) - Adds resourcepack features and a GUI to more conveniently configure OptiFine alternatives

[Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) - Alternative Options Menu for Sodium

[ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) - A Minecraft Mod to record, relive and share your experience

[Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify) - In-game resource pack, data pack and shader browser and updater

[Remove Reloading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/rrls) - Makes resource packs load in the background, allowing you to do other things while waiting!

[Screenshot to Clipboard](https://modrinth.com/mod/screenshot-to-clipboard) - Screenshots taken are copied to the clipboard

[Seamless Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/seamless-loading-screen) - Takes a screenshot of the game when you leave a world or server, and displays it when you rejoin it

[Searchables](https://modrinth.com/mod/searchables) - Searchables is a library mod that adds helper methods that allow for searching and filtering elements based on components, as well as offering built in auto-complete functionality

[ServerCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/servercore) - A mod that aims to optimize the minecraft server

[Show Me Your Skin!](https://modrinth.com/mod/show-me-your-skin) - A mod to hide or customize armor rendering

[Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - View the contents of shulker boxes from your inventory

[3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) - Render the player skin layer in 3d!

[SmoothMenu Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/smoothmenu-refabricated) - Removes the main menu FPS limit. Fabric port of SmoothMenu by BookerCatch

[Sodium Extra](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-extra) - Features that shouldn't be in Sodium

[Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - A modern rendering engine for Minecraft which greatly improves performance

[Sodium Shadowy Path Blocks](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-shadowy-path-blocks) - Reintroduces vanilla-like smooth lighting to non-full blocks (e.g. dirt paths and how they have dark shading when directly next to a full block) when using Sodium

[Tool Stats](https://modrinth.com/mod/tool-stats) - Provides additional tooltip info for items

[YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - A builder-based configuration library for Minecraft

[Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify) - A zoom mod with infinite customizability

</details>
